title: Sub-skill manifest (Markdown frontmatter)
description: Frontmatter schema for every SKILL.md under skills/. Validated in CI. Compatible with Anthropic Skills (name + description + license) plus our engineering layer (version + tokens_target + triggers).

name.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. MUST match the parent directory name (e.g. skills/code-quality/SKILL.md -> name: code-quality).

description.description: Single-sentence trigger condition: when should this skill be loaded? Anthropic-recognised field; surfaced to the agent for skill selection.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or short name. Optional; defaults to MIT when omitted.

version.description: Semantic version of this skill file.

triggers.description: Short trigger phrases the router matches against to decide when to load this skill. Used by the parent skill-everything router; complements the Anthropic-standard description field.

loads_after.description: Sub-skills that should be loaded BEFORE this one when both apply.

supersedes.description: Sub-skills this one replaces. Used by migration tooling.
